## Definition of Done Checklist

- [ ] Implementation matches the agreed scope
- [ ] No product behavior changed outside scope
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npx expo export --platform ios` passes (if routing, native modules, or bundling affected)
- [ ] Docs updated if architecture, process, or product truth changed
- [ ] No unrelated refactors included
